div.head: Delegate White to the Secretary of State.
div.p: (Mr. White states that, referring to his two dispatches two and seven, he would be glad to hear the department’s views on the Jewish question, which he hopes to bring before the conference, probably next Saturday or Monday. Mr. White also states that he fears the form suggested by grand rabbi and others will be inadequate and unsatisfactory to our Jewish fellow-citizens, and yet it would not be wise to say anything likely to be prejudicial to Jews in Morocco.
